Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class FeedComment

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.FeedComment
public class FeedComment extends SObject

Java class for FeedComment complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="FeedComment">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="CommentBody" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CommentType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FeedAttachments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FeedItemId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FeedRevisions" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FeedThreadedComments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="HasEntityLinks" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="InsertedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="InsertedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsRichText" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsVerified" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastEditById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastEditDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ParentId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RelatedRecordId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Revision" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Status" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ThreadChildrenCount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ThreadLastUpdatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ThreadLevel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ThreadParent" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}FeedComment" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ThreadParentId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
